name: Grok 4.5
description: Grok 4.5 is an announced SpaceXAI reasoning model currently in private beta at SpaceX and Tesla. Public API availability, pricing, and independent benchmark results have not been announced.

details.name: availability
details.value: Elon Musk announced Grok 4.5 as a private beta at SpaceX and Tesla; no public launch date has been announced.

details.name: api_availability
details.value: SpaceXAI documentation does not list a public Grok 4.5 API model ID, pricing, or AI Stats Gateway route yet.

details.name: foundation_model
details.value: Announced as based on a 1.5T V9 foundation model with Cursor data added during supplemental training.

details.name: public_benchmarks
details.value: No independent public benchmark results are available for Grok 4.5 yet.
